---
title: "OEKA201Assignment<KLBRHBAY>"
---
## Welcome
This website presents the assignments for OEKA201 completed by:


- **Bertelsen, Fredrik-André Hov**


- **Yousefi, Arya**

- **Røijem, Bendik Strømme**

- **Lund, Kristian**

## About this website
The site contains our econmetrics assignmetn analysing mortality rates across US states using socioeconomic & health-related variables.

The assinment is presented in two versions:
 - [Bjørnar's assignment using Gretl](assignment_gretl.qmd) - estimation and analysis performed in Gretl
 - [Bjørnar's assignment using R](assignment_r.qmd) - the same analysis replicatied using R code
